tracking.tooltip.active: NeuroSkill tracking is active. Click to pause for 1h.
tracking.tooltip.paused: NeuroSkill tracking is paused. Click to resume.
connect.disconnectedTooltip: Not connected to daemon — click to retry
connect.success: NeuroSkill: Connected to daemon on port {0}
connect.failure: NeuroSkill: Could not connect to daemon. Is it running?
stuck.noChat: No AI chat extension found. Try installing GitHub Copilot.
report.empty: NeuroSkill: No brain data for today yet.
report.title: Today's Brain Report
report.statusFailed: NeuroSkill: Could not fetch brain status.
stuck.checkFailed: NeuroSkill: Could not check struggle status.
best.fetchFailed: NeuroSkill: Could not fetch optimal hours.
output.tokenMissing: Daemon auth token not found at {0} — is the daemon running?
sidebar.disconnected.hint: Make sure the NeuroSkill app is running.
sidebar.disclaimer: Research tool only — not a medical device. Not cleared by the FDA, CE, or any regulatory body. Not for clinical use.
validation.kss.prompt: How sleepy do you feel right now? (Karolinska Sleepiness Scale)
validation.kss.7: 7 — Sleepy, but no effort to stay awake
validation.kss.8: 8 — Sleepy, some effort to stay awake
validation.tlx.prompt: Rate the workload of the task you just finished (NASA-TLX). Opens in the NeuroSkill app.
validation.pvt.prompt: No PVT this week. Run a 3-minute reaction-time task now to validate your fatigue score?
validation.action.snoozeDesc: Don't ask again for the next 30 minutes
validation.action.disabledPermAck: {0} prompts disabled. Re-enable in NeuroSkill validation settings.
